name: TENAX Law Group PC
message: [AI generated] TENAX Law Group, P.C. is a U.S.-based law firm that specializes in numerous sectors. Areas of practice include business law, estate planning & trusts, real estate law, civil litigation, among others. It is committed to providing high-quality legal services & personalized solutions to both individuals and businesses. Located in Point Richmond, California, they're renowned for maintaining professional and cost-effective legal solutions.
